overview: Save Shop System is a premium SaaS shop management platform for Indian small business owners featuring advanced analytics, rankings leaderboard, Diamond Rewards gamification, in-app advertisement system, batch FIFO inventory, multi-role access, and bilingual Hindi/English support.
features: Top Performance Master Card with #1 badges for product, customer, vendor, diamond earner
Rankings leaderboard — Top 10 lists for products, customers, vendors, staff with medal badges
Enhanced Diamond Rewards — 4 tiers (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Diamond), 1 diamond per ₹100 sale, progress bar
Advertisement system — banner carousel, card ads, watch-to-earn rewards, vendor promotions
Smart Insights — most selling, high profit, low stock, out of stock, low price alerts
Premium Amazon/Zerodha style compact UI with gold ranking, green profit, red alerts, blue analytics
Batch FIFO inventory management with advanced costing
Hindi/English bilingual toggle with instant switch
Dark/Light mode with premium color system
